Appearance

Rusty Rules RefereeGame Server Administration Bot

A high-performance Urban Terror 4.3 server admin bot written in Rust — fast, safe, and extensible with 30 plugins.

Get Started
Download Installer
Command Reference
View on GitHub
⚡

Blazing Fast

Rust-native log parsing and async event handling powered by tokio. No GC pauses, no memory leaks in a 24/7 service.

🔌

30 Plugins

Moderation, statistics, anti-abuse, chat logging, server management, and more — all configurable and extensible.

🎯

Real-Time Monitoring

Async log file tailing with rotation detection. Events are parsed and dispatched to plugins in milliseconds.

🌐

Web Dashboard

SvelteKit-based admin panel with live scoreboard, chat, RCON console, player management, and XLRstats leaderboards.

🗄️

Dual Database Support

SQLite for simplicity or MySQL for scale. Automatic migrations on startup keep your schema current.

📊

XLRstats

Extended player statistics with ELO-based skill tracking, weapon stats, map stats, and leaderboards.

Released under the GPL-2.0 License.
